functions.name: cidmulv2_labelled
params: #   #  Perform Cliff's method for all pairs of J independent groups.   #  The familywise type I error probability is controlled via   #  Hochberg's method.   #   #  The data are assumed to be stored in $x$ in list mode or in a   #  matrix with J columns
columns corresponding to groups.   #   #  It is assumed all groups are independent.   #   #  Missing values are automatically removed.   #   #   g
x is assumed to be a matrix or have list mode   #   if g is specified
it is assumed that column g of x is   #   a factor variable and that the dependent variable of interest is in column   #   dp of x
which can be a matrix or data frame.   #   data
# the _numeric_ codes you feed into cidmul   glab
# the _character_ labels you want to see in the output   dp

return_value.key: #' @param plotting_trim_percent Reactive returning trim % from Plotting
